core.zh: 私有工作区结构清晰，敏感资产保持 local-only。
core.en: Private workspace layout is clear; sensitive assets stay local-only.

core.zh: 统一 contract runner 已覆盖大量 host-side contract 与 analyzer gates，并持续接入真实 source / runtime blocker lanes。
core.en: The unified contract runner now covers many host-side contract and analyzer gates, with newer source / runtime blocker lanes.

core.zh: 基础 packet value model、reader/writer、differential fixtures 与 DecodeBuffer contract 已覆盖基础语义。
core.en: Basic packet value models, reader/writer checks, differential fixtures, and DecodeBuffer contracts cover core semantics.

core.zh: ZTL shard10、dirty-filtered quarantine、shard7 V__ZRef 等 metadata / opaque-token facts 已大规模进入 formal promotion；不声明生产 ZTL ABI/layout/lifetime/refcount/destructor/vtable。
core.en: ZTL shard10, dirty-filtered quarantine, shard7 V__ZRef, and related metadata / opaque-token facts have moved into formal promotion at scale; production ZTL ABI/layout/lifetime/refcount/destructor/vtable are not claimed.

core.zh: 已有 socket/packet seam skeleton、network compile contract 与 DecodeBuffer source-contract 面；底层连接、加密与 buffer lifecycle 未完整建模。
core.en: Socket/packet seam skeleton, network compile contract, and DecodeBuffer source-contract coverage exist; low-level connection, crypto, and buffer lifecycle are not fully modeled.

core.zh: SelectWorldResult、AvatarLook::Decode 有 IDA/runtime 证据；WorldInformation、SelectCharacterResult 与 send-side contracts 未完成。
core.en: SelectWorldResult and AvatarLook::Decode have IDA/runtime evidence; WorldInformation, SelectCharacterResult, and send-side contracts remain pending.

core.zh: SetField fixture、CField raw-member、party kick/withdraw、timebase、GetFieldKey 与 portal pre-send gates 已推进；完整 CharacterData 仍是长尾。
core.en: SetField fixtures, CField raw-member, party kick/withdraw, timebase, GetFieldKey, and portal pre-send gates have advanced; full CharacterData remains a long tail.

core.zh: local user movement fixture 已 decode/re-encode；CMovePath option-key-2 raw/neutral contract 与 local-only fixture 边界已推进，但更广 runtime correlation 仍 blocked。
core.en: A clean local movement fixture is decoded/re-encoded; CMovePath option-key-2 raw/neutral contract and local-only fixture boundaries advanced, but broader runtime correlation remains blocked.

core.zh: NPC movement stream 已和 local user movement 分离；reader/writer prefix/body 对齐。
core.en: The NPC movement stream is separated from local user movement, with reader/writer prefix and body alignment.

core.zh: ActionMan path contract 与 action mapping helpers 已进入 host-side contract；完整资源系统未重构。
core.en: ActionMan path contracts and action mapping helpers are in the host-side contract set; the full resource system is not reconstructed.

core.zh: Batch008 已记录 cString accessor、pointer-view、ASCII search/compare 的窄 host-side source-contract facts；不声明生产布局、allocator/lifetime、imported API parity 或 verified。
core.en: Batch008 records narrow cString accessor, pointer-view, and ASCII search/compare host-side source-contract facts; no production layout, allocator/lifetime, imported API parity, or verified status is claimed.

core.zh: Tier2 shard2 Median neutral 的 6 个 EA table facts 已进入 ABI doc / promotion record；不声明 production sort correctness。
core.en: Six Tier2 shard2 Median neutral EA table facts are documented in ABI docs / promotion records; production sort correctness is not claimed.

core.zh: 低风险 host-side source contracts 已扩展到 CField、CWvsContext、CVecCtrl、CMovePath option-2、timebase、Base64、EqSlotInfo、cash text-money 等方向。
core.en: Low-risk host-side source contracts now cover CField, CWvsContext, CVecCtrl, CMovePath option-2, timebase, Base64, EqSlotInfo, cash text-money, and related lanes.

core.zh: CVecCtrl::Init、SetInput、ladder/rope secure-pair、writer/update、SetImpactNext 已进入 source-contract-with-limits；不声明完整 movement physics/runtime equivalence。
core.en: CVecCtrl::Init, SetInput, ladder/rope secure-pair, writer/update, and SetImpactNext are reviewed as source-contract-with-limits; full movement physics/runtime equivalence is not claimed.

core.zh: CWvsContext::GetCurFieldID 与 request-state helpers 已进入 reviewed source-contract lane；不声明 secure-storage ABI、SetField handoff 或 runtime equivalence。
core.en: CWvsContext::GetCurFieldID and request-state helpers have entered reviewed source-contract lanes; secure-storage ABI, SetField handoff, and runtime equivalence are not claimed.

core.zh: 同图传送/field transition 的 pre-send gate、候选点与 inputstate readiness 已 review；positive runtime proof 已派发但未 PASS。
core.en: Same-map field transition pre-send gate, candidate points, and input-state readiness are reviewed; positive runtime proof is dispatched but not PASS yet.

core.zh: Base64 char/value scalar mapper 已有 neutral contract；不声明完整 codec、padding、buffer 或 runtime parity。
core.en: Base64 char/value scalar mappers now have neutral contracts; full codec, padding, buffer, or runtime parity is not claimed.

core.zh: EqSlotInfo X/Y coordinate lookup 已有 neutral contract；不声明 UI/layout/runtime 语义。
core.en: EqSlotInfo X/Y coordinate lookup now has neutral contracts; UI, layout, and runtime semantics are not claimed.

core.zh: CashTrading text-money 四个 helper rows 已进入 neutral recorder/helper-boundary contract；不声明完整格式化语义。
core.en: Four CashTrading text-money helper rows now have neutral recorder/helper-boundary contracts; full formatting semantics are not claimed.

core.zh: Tier2Ext / ZTL 多个 shard 的 row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts 已进入 formal promotion；这不是 source intake、runtime equivalence 或 verified。
core.en: Row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts from Tier2Ext and ZTL shards have entered formal promotion; these are not source intake, runtime equivalence, or verified reconstruction.

core.zh: Claude Tier2 外部报告完成 475 对 .cpp/.h；主仓可信 handoff 覆盖 461 对，仍缺 shard3，不能算 source intake。
core.en: Claude Tier2 is externally reported complete with 475 .cpp/.h pairs; trusted main-repo handoff covers 461 pairs and still lacks shard3, so this is not source intake.

core.zh: Tier2Ext shard1-18 已从 metadata-only intake 推进到 metadata / opaque-token promoted-with-limits；仍不等于 source intake。
core.en: Tier2Ext shards 1-18 have moved from metadata-only intake to metadata / opaque-token promoted-with-limits; this is still not source intake.

core.zh: Tier2Ext quarantine/Zs plan 覆盖 2218 files；cleanup、/Zs、IDA MCP 顺序已建立，但大量文件仍需 cleanup/quarantine。
core.en: Tier2Ext quarantine/Zs plan covers 2218 files; cleanup, /Zs, and IDA MCP ordering is established, but many files still require cleanup/quarantine.

milestones.name: Login smoke
milestones.zh: 登录链路可通过自动化 smoke。
milestones.en: Login flow passes automation smoke.

milestones.name: Character select smoke
milestones.zh: 选人流程可进入后续 migration。
milestones.en: Character select can proceed into migration.

milestones.name: Channel migration
milestones.zh: SelectCharacter 后可切入 channel-side MigrateIn。
milestones.en: After SelectCharacter, the client reaches channel-side MigrateIn.

milestones.name: Field entry map 10000
milestones.zh: clean baseline 可见进入 tutorial map。
milestones.en: Clean baseline reaches visible tutorial map.

milestones.name: Field CRC clean baseline
milestones.zh: map 10000 的 live client CRC 与 Kinoko 对照值匹配。
milestones.en: Live client CRC for map 10000 matches the Kinoko comparison value.

milestones.name: Portal tuto00 path
milestones.zh: UserPortalScriptRequest 正常触发 tutoChatNPC。
milestones.en: UserPortalScriptRequest correctly reaches tutoChatNPC.

milestones.name: SetField boundary
milestones.zh: SetField prefix、seed、FILETIME tail 和当前 CharacterData section map 已建立。
milestones.en: SetField prefix, seeds, FILETIME tail, and the current CharacterData section map are established.

milestones.name: Host contract suite
milestones.zh: 统一 contract runner 覆盖大量 contract / analyzer gates，并持续接入真实 source/runtime blocker lanes。
milestones.en: The unified contract runner covers many contract / analyzer gates and continues to absorb real source/runtime blocker lanes.

milestones.name: Formal promotions
milestones.zh: 当前 formal promotions 为 6937；verified 仍为 0。主要是 metadata / opaque-token / row-identity facts。
milestones.en: Current formal promotions are 6937; verified remains 0. These are mostly metadata / opaque-token / row-identity facts.

milestones.name: Metadata promotions
milestones.zh: Tier2Ext / ZTL 多个 shard 的 metadata facts 已大规模 formal promotion；不代表源码等价或 runtime 等价。
milestones.en: Metadata facts from multiple Tier2Ext / ZTL shards have moved into formal promotion at scale; this does not mean source or runtime equivalence.

milestones.name: CMovePath option-2 runtime fixture
milestones.zh: SetField option key 2 可发出；local-only fixture 有证据，但 fresh runtime correlation 被 NPC move / payload width blocker 卡住。
milestones.en: SetField option key 2 can be emitted; local-only fixture evidence exists, but fresh runtime correlation is blocked by NPC move / payload-width issues.

milestones.name: Field transition proof
milestones.zh: 同图传送/field transition 的 positive proof 已派发；尚未得到 PASS。
milestones.en: Positive same-map field transition proof is dispatched; no PASS yet.

milestones.name: CVecCtrl source-contract lane
milestones.zh: Init、SetInput、ladder/rope、writer/update、SetImpactNext 已进入 source-contract-with-limits。
milestones.en: Init, SetInput, ladder/rope, writer/update, and SetImpactNext are reviewed as source-contract-with-limits.

milestones.name: ZTL shard7 V__ZRef metadata
milestones.zh: ZTL shard7 V__ZRef 372 个 row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts 已 promotion；source-contract lane 仍 blocked。
milestones.en: ZTL shard7 V__ZRef has 372 row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts promoted; the source-contract lane remains blocked.

milestones.name: ZTL dirty-filtered metadata
milestones.zh: ZTL dirty-filtered quarantine 1659 个 active row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts 已 promotion。
milestones.en: ZTL dirty-filtered quarantine has 1659 active row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts promoted.

milestones.name: ZTL shard10 metadata
milestones.zh: ZTL shard10 78 个 row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts 已 promotion。
milestones.en: ZTL shard10 has 78 row-identity / opaque-token metadata facts promoted.

milestones.name: Base64 neutral contract
milestones.zh: Base64 neutral scalar helper/test/runner contract 已 review；不声明完整 codec parity。
milestones.en: Base64 neutral scalar helper/test/runner contract is reviewed; full codec parity is not claimed.

milestones.name: Tier2 translation
milestones.zh: 外部 Tier2 报告完成 475 对 .cpp/.h；主仓可信 handoff 仍缺 shard3。
milestones.en: External Tier2 is reported complete with 475 .cpp/.h pairs; trusted main-repo handoff still lacks shard3.

milestones.name: Tier2Ext intake
milestones.zh: Tier2Ext shard1-18 已推进到 metadata / opaque-token promoted-with-limits；没有 source intake。
milestones.en: Tier2Ext shards 1-18 have moved to metadata / opaque-token promoted-with-limits; no source intake is claimed.

milestones.name: Tier2Ext quarantine plan
milestones.zh: quarantine/Zs plan 已通过 review，后续仍需 cleanup、scoped Zs 和 IDA MCP。
milestones.en: The quarantine/Zs plan passed review; cleanup, scoped Zs, and IDA MCP work are still required.

milestones.name: Shard18 /Zs audit
milestones.zh: Shard18 header-only /Zs 通过，但 direct source /Zs 失败，需要 generated-only harness repair。
milestones.en: Shard18 header-only /Zs passes, but direct source /Zs fails and needs generated-only harness repair.

milestones.name: Local user move 0x002C
milestones.zh: 已有一条 clean 112-byte movement fixture，可由 contract split decode/re-encode。
milestones.en: One clean 112-byte local movement fixture is split-decoded and re-encoded by contracts.

milestones.name: NPC movement stream
milestones.zh: 已确认是 NPC movement stream，不再混入 local user move。
milestones.en: Confirmed as NPC movement stream, not local user movement.

milestones.name: Full CharacterData
milestones.zh: 当前 fixture map 较强，但完整 nested decode 未完成。
milestones.en: Current fixture map is strong, but full nested decode is not complete.

milestones.name: Full MovePath variants
milestones.zh: core body 与一个 clean sample 已验证；更多 attr/option/tail 变体待补。
milestones.en: Core body and one clean sample are validated; more
